productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kaffle Yellow Kidswear
description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic stripes, lettering and applique on the frontFittingRegular 98 cm (24-30 months) Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Make every little boys dream come true with this tree house tee from gini and jony. The house applique and directions for making a tree house on the front of the tee all add to the happy energy of this tee.  Team this with denim shorts and comfy crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
